description: Stable showcase bundle for an external frontend. Ship this JSON together with ./images/*. Frontend should preload the image and the default question, and optionally surface the recommended grounding phrase. The top-level anchor question per sample is the validated path; richer variants are exploratory prompt options and are not individually verified golden outputs.

samples.title: Taxi Shirt Color
samples.question: What is the color of the man's shirt?
samples.expected_answer: The man's shirt appears to be yellow.

variants.title: Anchor
variants.question: What is the color of the man's shirt?
variants.expected_answer: The man's shirt appears to be yellow.

variants.title: Visible Objects
variants.question: What visible objects, clothing items, and vehicles are around the man?
variants.expected_answer: The man is wearing a yellow shirt and is next to a yellow taxi, with folding chairs and clothing around him.

variants.title: Action And Scene
variants.question: Describe the man, the vehicle, and the objects he is handling.
variants.expected_answer: A man in a yellow shirt is standing by an open taxi trunk while handling folding chairs with clothes hanging on them.

variants.title: Standout Details
variants.question: What color and object details stand out most in this street scene?
variants.expected_answer: The yellow shirt and yellow taxi stand out most, along with blue clothing draped over folding chairs.

samples.title: Room Dresser
samples.question: What is under the mirror?
samples.notes: Relation-to-object demo with a very clean answer.

variants.title: Anchor
variants.question: What is under the mirror?
variants.expected_answer: A wooden dresser with drawers.

variants.title: Room Objects
variants.question: What furniture and visible objects can you identify in this room?
variants.expected_answer: The room shows a bed, a wooden dresser with a mirror, a chair by the window, a bookshelf, plants, and a basket.

variants.title: Left To Right
variants.question: Describe the room from left to right using visible furniture and objects.
variants.expected_answer: From left to right there is a bed and dresser with a mirror, then a window with a chair and plants, and a tall bookshelf with a basket nearby.

variants.title: Main Focal Areas
variants.question: What are the main focal areas in this room scene?
variants.expected_answer: The main focal areas are the bed in the foreground, the dresser and mirror on the left, and the window and bookshelf on the right.

samples.title: Bench Foreground
samples.question: What piece of furniture is in the foreground?
samples.expected_answer: The foreground features a metal bench with slatted backrest and seat, positioned on grass under tree shade.
samples.notes: Large isolated object. Good first demo for a new audience.

variants.title: Anchor
variants.question: What piece of furniture is in the foreground?
variants.expected_answer: The foreground features a metal bench with slatted backrest and seat, positioned on grass under tree shade.

variants.title: Park Objects
variants.question: What objects are visible in this park scene?
variants.expected_answer: The scene shows a metal bench on grass, trees, a walkway, parked cars, and another bench farther back.

variants.title: Foreground And Background
variants.question: Describe the foreground and background of this park image.
variants.expected_answer: In the foreground there is a metal bench on a concrete pad in the grass, while the background has trees, a walkway, and parked cars.

variants.title: Furniture And Environment
variants.question: What furniture, natural elements, and vehicles can you identify here?
variants.expected_answer: The image contains a bench, grassy lawn, large trees, and several parked cars along the road.

samples.title: Train On Railway
samples.question: What is in the middle of the railway?
samples.expected_answer: A train is on the railway tracks, positioned centrally with its likely green and white coloring.

variants.title: Anchor
variants.question: What is in the middle of the railway?
variants.expected_answer: A train is on the railway tracks, positioned centrally with its likely green and white coloring.

variants.title: Major Objects
variants.question: What major objects make up this railway scene?
variants.expected_answer: The scene includes a train on the tracks, utility poles and wires, grass, and buildings in the distance.

variants.title: Railway Description
variants.question: Describe the train scene, including the railway and surrounding structures.
variants.expected_answer: A train is traveling along curved railway tracks with utility poles and overhead wires on the sides, surrounded by grass and a few buildings.

variants.title: Transport And Landscape
variants.question: What transportation and landscape elements are visible in this image?
variants.expected_answer: Visible elements include a train, railway tracks, poles and wires, grassy sides, and distant houses or hills.

samples.title: Man Holding Dog
samples.question: What animal is the man holding?
samples.expected_answer: The man is holding a small dog with light brown fur on its his shoulder.
samples.notes: Small foreground object with a clear clicked phrase.

variants.title: Anchor
variants.question: What animal is the man holding?
variants.expected_answer: The man is holding a small dog with light brown fur on its his shoulder.

variants.title: People Animal Clothing
variants.question: Describe the visible people, animals, and clothing in the image.
variants.expected_answer: The image shows a man holding a small light-colored dog while wearing a blue garment with colorful trim.

variants.title: Subject And Clothing
variants.question: How would you describe the subject, the animal, and their clothing details?
variants.expected_answer: A man is holding a small dog against his shoulder, and he is wrapped in a blue cloth with bright patterned trim.

variants.title: Appearance Details
variants.question: What visible entities and appearance details can you identify?
variants.expected_answer: There is a man with gray hair and facial hair, and he is holding a small dog with light fur.
